layout.authTagline: Integrated management for growing companies. Sales, inventory, finance, and teams in one place.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to JCD ERP. Here you will see executive KPIs and your company's operational status.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Access your company's workspace.
login.tenantSlugHint: Your company identifier from registration (lowercase, no spaces).

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register your company and the administrator user.
register.slugHint: Used to sign in. E.g. my-company

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If the email is registered, you will receive instructions to reset your password. Check your inbox (in development, the link appears in the API console).

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.

errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email, password, or company slug. Check your details and try again.
errors.tenantSlugRequired: Your email is registered in more than one company. Enter the company slug (e.g. jcdprogramer).
errors.tenantInactive: The company is inactive. Contact the administrator.
errors.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Please try again.
errors.registerFailed: Could not complete registration. Please try again.
errors.forgotPasswordFailed: Could not send the recovery link. Please try again.
errors.resetPasswordFailed: Could not reset the password. Please try again.
errors.invalidResetToken: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.slugAlreadyExists: That company slug already exists. Use another name or slug.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage your team and their access roles.
users.tempPasswordHint: Minimum 8 characters. The user can change it later.
users.deleteMessage: Delete user "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

roles.title: Roles
roles.subtitle: Define custom roles and assign system access permissions.
roles.deleteMessage: Delete role "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
roles.name: Role name

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tenant configuration values for your organization.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.notFound: Resource not available on the server. Restart the backend with the latest code.
errors.apiOutdated: The API server is outdated. Restart the backend (dotnet run) and try again.
errors.userEmailAlreadyExists: A user with that email already exists in your company.
errors.userCannotDeleteSelf: You cannot delete your own account.
errors.roleNameAlreadyExists: A role with that name already exists in your company.
errors.roleIsSystem: System roles cannot be modified or deleted.
errors.roleHasUsers: Cannot delete a role that has assigned users.
errors.permissionNotFound: One or more selected permissions are invalid.
errors.tenantRequired: Could not identify your company. Sign out and sign in again.
